trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four confirmation signals aligned (MACD bullish crossover, RSI 55.1 with ample room before overbought, rising histogram, price above SMA-20) on a risk-on day; adds crypto mining sector exposure that diversifies away from our existing tech and fintech concentration.

decisions.briefing: Moderate risk-on session with NASDAQ +1.1% and S&P 500 +0.6% clears the bar for deploying our remaining $677 cash. Buying WULF — the highest-scoring candidate with the most RSI headroom (55.1) among our score-95 group — filling one open slot and diversifying into digital assets. No manual sells warranted; existing positions continue to hold above stop-loss levels and stop/target automation handles any triggers.

market_education.summary_en: Markets kicked off the week in a risk-on mood as investors returned from the Independence Day holiday, with the NASDAQ rising 1.1% and the S&P 500 gaining 0.6%, led by technology and growth stocks. The advance was broad-based and driven largely by momentum and renewed positioning rather than a single macro catalyst, as no major economic data were scheduled for release. Continued optimism around AI infrastructure spending and resilient corporate earnings expectations kept sentiment tilted toward equities over defensives.
market_education.summary_zh: 投資者在獨立日假期後回歸市場，週一整體情緒偏向風險偏好，納斯達克指數上漲1.1%、標普500指數升0.6%，由科技股及成長型股票領漲。由於當日缺乏重大宏觀數據，升勢主要由動能交易與資金重新部署驅動，而非單一基本面催化劑。市場對AI基礎建設支出持續增長及企業盈利前景的樂觀情緒，令資金持續流入股市而非防禦性資產。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing strong, consistent technical signals — betting that assets already in motion tend to stay in motion. The 'sweet spot' is when RSI sits between 55 and 70 (bullish but not overbought), MACD has just crossed above its signal line, and price is above its 20-day moving average. Today's WULF buy illustrates this perfectly: all four signals confirmed, giving us high conviction to deploy cash on a risk-on day rather than waiting for a perfect entry that may never come.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入技術訊號持續走強的股票，押注「強者恆強」的市場慣性。最理想的入場區間是RSI介於55至70之間（偏強但尚未超買）、MACD剛完成黃金交叉，且股價站穩20日移動平均線之上。今日買入WULF正是此策略的完美示範：四大確認訊號同步出現，在風險偏好的市場環境下，我們有充分信心積極部署現金，而非守株待兔等待一個可能永遠不會出現的完美入場點。
